name: Praline Susies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a large heavy pan with a handle.
2. In the pan, combine sugar, buttermilk, baking soda, and cinnamon.
3. Heat the mixture over medium to medium-high heat until it reaches a boil.
4. Stir constantly with a wooden spoon.
5. Continue boiling until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (234°F) or as indicated on a candy thermometer.
6. Remove from heat and gradually add the chopped pecans, vanilla, and stir vigorously until the candy loses its shine, about 10 minutes.
7. Drop the candy onto waxed paper.
8. This recipe makes approximately 18 candies. Once it loses its sheen, work quickly as it will set up further.
